description: Product Description A GREAT GIFT DELIVERED STRAIGHT TO YOUR DOOR ARTS & CRAFTS GIFT SET FOR GIRLS - 38 colourful scented marker pens in a fun pencil case for holidays and travel. 38 pens! This set contains 38 pens of different sizes -perfect for drawing, coloring and arts and crafts. Girls will love the cute carry case which keeps all the pens neat and tidy. Creative fun! This makes a great gift for girls and allows them to explore their artistic talent in a fun way! Fruity scents! The smell of these pens will make your mouth water! Every pen has a fruity scent to make your artwork even more special. Choose your favourite scent from lemon, apple, orange, blueberry, candy, strawberrry and watermelon. What will your favourite be? Arts & crafts for kids The fun, bright carry case unfolds to reveal the pretty selection of different pens. Girls will love carrying it around. FOR CREATIVE KIDS that love drawing and colouring during school, travel & holidays. With 3 different sized pens in the collection - girls can colour, doodle and write with the pens. Birthday present idea! If you're sending this as a birthday present or gift, we can Gift Wrap it for you and add a Gift Tag! Just click on the Gift Wrapping Option at the checkout and we'll do the rest for you. So simple and such a treat for the birthday girl!
